description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: build, distribution, and release, using the docker:latest image globally and the docker:dind service. In the build stage add a codequality job that runs on docker:latest, uses the docker:dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay, and executes `docker run --env CODECLIMATE_CODE="$PWD" --volume "$PWD":/code --volume /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock --volume /tmp/cc:/tmp/cc codeclimate/codeclimate analyze -f json > codeclimate.json`, then stores codeclimate.json as an artifact; also add a compile job that runs on the qaclana/qaclana-build-image image, creates a Go workspace under /go/src/gitlab.com/qaclana, symlinks the project, changes into it, runs `make ci`, and saves the _output directory as an artifact on success. In the distribution stage add a build-distribution job on docker:latest that logs in to the GitLab registry with `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY`, builds the image `docker build -t $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE .` and pushes it with `docker push $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE`. In the release stage add a release-final-image-to-ci-registry job that runs only on the master branch, logs in to the registry, pulls $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, tags it as $CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and pushes it to the GitLab Container Registry; also add a release-final-image-to-dockerhub job that runs only on the master branch of the qaclana/qaclana project, logs in to the registry, pulls $CONTAINER_TEST_IMAGE, logs in to Docker Hub using $DOCKER_HUB_USERNAME and $DOCKER_HUB_PASSWORD, tags the image as $HUB_CONTAINER_RELEASE_IMAGE, and pushes it to Docker Hub.
